title: Session 22 — Koviz Confusion
bodyText:
# What happened
The morning after: daylight spells cast for the first time in days, townsfolk emerging, and rumors everywhere. The party navigated **accusations and suspicion** over [[root-darkpass|Root]]'s death. **[[pc-brolin|Brolin]] publicly declined his father's guild seat.** In the Stonemasons' power vacuum, leaders jockeyed — **[[gilly]]** (cleric), **Drumnar** (cleric), and **[[ghruom]]** — and **Ghruom vowed to find Root's killer.**

*(The DM doc for this session ends at its opening — some beats here may actually belong to S23; the two sessions blur in the record.)*
